title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system that enables legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Founded by Max Junestrand, it leverages Anthropic's models to interpret law and build capabilities that improve with each new model release.
